compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add llm_behavioral category to agent-routing.conf
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Add llm_behavioral=dso:bot-psychologist|general-purpose to config/agent-routing.conf with header table update

comments.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Routing conf contains llm_behavioral category
  Verify: grep -q '^llm_behavioral=' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/config/agent-routing.conf
- [ ] Task 3 tests pass (GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-agent-routing-conf.sh

## Implementation Notes
- Add: llm_behavioral=dso:bot-psychologist|general-purpose
- Add dso:bot-psychologist row to header Agent Identifier table (test-exempt: static docs)
- discover-agents.sh resolves dso: prefix via dso@digital-service-orchestra in enabledPlugins (verified)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Header table row must clarify dso: agents are local plugin agents resolved via plugins/dso/agents/<name>.md, not enabledPlugins lookup. discover-agents.sh extracts 'dso' but won't find it in enabledPlugins — dso: agents are dispatched directly by orchestrators, not through discover-agents.sh. Suggested row: dso:bot-psychologist | (local plugin agent, resolved via plugins/dso/agents/)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Tests passing (GREEN) ✓ - test-agent-routing-conf.sh: 16 passed, 0 failed; test-discover-agents.sh: 36 passed, 0 failed
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — Files: config/agent-routing.conf, plugins/dso/scripts/discover-agents.sh, tests/scripts/test-discover-agents.sh (modified). Tests: 52 pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: llm_behavioral routing category added to agent-routing.conf + discover-agents.sh dso: prefix handling
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
